Not exactly top-notch service. And it all depends on the clerk at the counter. Some don't even deserve to be there.

General management with a sales agency. Agency decent service. Waiting list. Fair commercial conditions for domestic tickets. International tickets subject to restrictions. The sign with the company logo would benefit from being refreshed (replaced) as it is drab and not appropriate for the center of a capital city.
Overloaded service, my daughter was not attached to my ticket and had to pay 8000 dinars in penalty, really abusing Air Algeria

Be careful, never call Air Algerie for a flight change over the phone. They are top-notch scammers. They will tell you they have to upgrade you and make you pay a huge supplement when it is not necessary. This is worthy of a low-cost airline! The last time I fly this airline! Ciao

I got my ticket refunded without any hassle the woman on the phone handled everything. Thank you for your expertise and dedication.

Luggage up to 20kg 10kg in the cabin, tickets can be changed and refunded as you wish, and once again, the staff is always on hand. The best airline in the world and a very good agency.

You don't even deserve one star. That tall, strong woman with a broken leg belongs in a boxing ring, not in a business. And it's the security guard who goes to see her every time to give us the information. On top of everything else, the

Personally, I've never flown with them before and I'm looking forward to it, but since I've had friends who have, they've left me with very positive impressions.

Your company is absolutely useless. How can you delay a flight just for trivial reasons when you know full well that there are people who have plans at their destination?
Flight was fine, but they can warn us when there are cancellations because we got up at 3 50 am.
A rotten agency, just like their employees. An agency that claims to close at 7 PM, it's 4 30 PM and they're already turning people away from the door.

Trip Verified My checked bag went missing after my flight with Air Algérie, and after some time the airline told me that it had been found at Béjaïa Airport. They said it would be sent to my home address, since I had already left Algeria. After that message, everything stopped. I have been trying to contact Air Algérie since the summer emails, forms, messages and I have not received a single reply. No update about my bag, no explanation, no follow-up. Months have passed and the airline continues to ignore every attempt I make to resolve the situation. Losing a bag can happen with any airline, but the complete silence after confirming they had located it is unacceptable. My belongings have still not been returned, and I have had to deal with this entirely on my own. This has been one of the worst customer service experiences I have ever had, and I am sharing this so others are aware of how Air Algérie handles situations when something goes wrong.

Trip Verified Worst cross-ocean flight I ever had. Issues we had - They lost our luggage - They do not offer to pay to deliver our luggage, and asked us to pay UPS to get it delivered to us. No facilities at all in Algiers Airport, hence terrible experience during connection. For our return trip, they changed our flight without a reason, and forced us to wait at Algiers Airport for 9 hours for a connection without giving a viable alternative.

Trip Verified Almost no announcements in English during flight. Plane very dirty, like not cleaned for decades, decaying 737-600, couldn't eat the suspicious snack given. Online check-in is actually not available for Air Algérie flights, as you need to have your ticket printed in the old fashioned way. Staff were friendly and professional but can't make it better with the airline they're working to.
Trip Verified The most dirty airplane I ve been in, gum sticked to the chairs, drops of dry dirt everywhere, the table is dirty also something was poured on it and wasn t cleaned.

Not Verified Very nice cabin, comfortable seats and good entertainment systems. The food tasted very good and there was enough food for the flight length. The flight attendants were all very friendly except 1 steward. (Plane 7T-VJA, Date 8 July 2019).

Not Verified Paris to Oran. Very bad service for an extremely expensive price. The plane cabin was dirty, the seats uncomfortable. The cabin crew were incompetent and very haughty. Take this airline only when absolutely necessary. If you choose to spend your vacation it is a very bad choice. Unfortunately this company puts our country to shame

Trip Verified Amman to Barcelona via Algiers. I would not recommend this airlines at all. During my trip from Amman to Barcelona through Algiers, all my checked in luggage was lost, and it has not been found since. I submitted two claims, but the airline never got back to me (not answering phone or email).

Trip Verified London to Algiers. There was a slight delay, but the service onboard was excellent. Clean, very nice food and friendly personnel. Very pleased with the whole experience. Would fly Air Algerie again.

Trip Verified Algiers to Paris, the worst airline ever. Aircraft is old and dirty. Flight time was delayed and postponed. The check in process at counter is very slow. The only efficiency thing is their system down time. The staff is not well trained etc.

Verified Review Bamako to Algiers. A 21 15 flight was delayed around 21 30. This was the first we heard anything. At around 22 30 we were told the plane would take off the next day. We were fed by 23 00. Around 00 00 shuttles started to a hotel. I got yelled at by airline personnel while boarding a shuttle. The last of us got to the hotel around 2 30 where we were dropped off with no information. The hotel was absolutely horrid. The hotel personnel shared no flight information so around noon the next day I asked for a number for the Air Algerie personnel who'd made the reservation. He picked up after about 3 calls and told me not to call back. Around 17 00 we were told to be ready to depart at 00 00. Around 23 40 2 shuttles came. There was a mad, unorganized rush to board the shuttles because there wasn't enough space. I got pushed and shoved but left behind. One shuttle left the hotel without having its door closed. Around 00 30 another shuttle came and I managed to get on. After standing in line at the airport for an hour I got a new boarding pass. I was assured that the luggage that I had handed over the previous day would be on the plane. Service on the flight was fairly decent. Plane landed around 8 00 and took off fine. The seat was absolutely filthy, however, and the bathroom was disgusting. My luggage did not come in. I tried to report my luggage as lost but was told I could not because I had no baggage claim tickets (they'd been taken by the airline when I got my new boarding pass). I was told to come back the next morning at 3 00. I got yelled at again while reporting the luggage lost. Another passenger said that a plane from Bamako was coming in at noon and we should wait so I did. luggage came in around 12 30.

1 star completely unacceptable.Air Algérie diverted my flight from Heathrow to Stansted without notifying me at all. I only found out through a friend, not the airline. That alone says everything about their communication or lack of it.I live near Heathrow, so being forced to travel an extra hour to Stansted was a major disruption. Worse still, I was traveling with my special needs daughter who requires a wheelchair. The airline showed zero consideration for passengers with disabilities or families with additional needs. Getting to Stansted is a serious challenge for us.No warning, no assistance, no empathy. This experience was stressful, exhausting, and completely avoidable. I would strongly advise disabled passengers and families to avoid Air Algérie.
Why have an online check in if I have to check in again at the airport? Wtf is wrong with you?

Worst customer service in this world, which kind of people who you can hear them talking bad about the client.
The worst airline you can ever imagine. Changed my flight and was refused refund, not even a partial refund. Avoid at all cost.

Honestly a disaster. I haven't used Air Algerie for over 15 years. I gave it ago today, and it was a catastrophic experience from start to end. Today the flight was on time, however, 1st class no signs or any indications to board as 1st class, we only been instructed to line up all in one lane and aggressive behaviour from the old lady leading the team, I hesitated to ask, but than had to and as the queue was too long etc. I was told yeah its ok to jump the queue but no organisation or anythjng. But importantly is once again the under performance of the staff not qualified to do the job to my opinion in all areas, it's obvious they are not scared of getting disciplined or reprimanded they make you feel they own the place and us customers we are under valued in fact we are nothing! The plane was very poor standards very old dirty everywhere and the shock is with all honesty from the start soon as we boarded the guy in charge Sat on a chair had coffee and kept talking to a couple of stewards they go n come back than that corner right behind the co pit turned into a meeting room they were 4 of them sat talking even when the pilot announced we are descending where the procedure is to raise the curtains and staff to lead by example after checking passengers and seat belt etc no no no one was checking they put the curtain down so that they dont get disturbed kept talking until nearly the end. It was disrespectful and unprofessional! I will never ever use Air Algerie again simple! Today's flight Algiers to London Heathrow.

If there was a way to give this airline a minus multiple times I would, how can you keep someone for almost a day without provision of accommodation or food, then when she complains you block her!Meanwhile your white passengers are treated like VIPs.

Air Algerie, is the worst airline in the world.Costumer service Zero very badStaff horrible Zero educationService under zeroFood the shit qualityTime always delaySo is better close the airport and use donkeys to travel .Ratssa morraRip off

Horrible experience I had my ticket confirmed I got to the airport they said sorry the plane is full apparently the sold tickets more then the capacity of the air planeSo they put me on the afternoon flight that flight got delayed 3hours would you believe itI left home at 6 in morning I got home at 23 40For two hours tripAir Algérie get lost
Worst airline ever poor customer service.text and call the will not pick I lost 400 for a flight ticket I never used and the refused to make redundant

They don't deserve even 0 .after 4 years I didn't see my family ,I booked with them.they cancel the flight, they didn't send any email.they never respond.they delay it to July 9 only to Algeria.there is no flight to tunisia.so we have to go home on donkeys guys.this is a piece of s h .

Still The same horror they made go inside the airplane and unbelievable nobody informing why there is delay . Now is almost 2 hours and we feel like sardines . The only thing they out the air conditioning on as we started to complain.2025 and still this kind of mistakes shame on you
Not even worth 1star they never answer your queries on time that s if they reply you may loose your flight and no one cares

I am writing to express my deep dissatisfaction with the treatment my mother and I received during a recent flight check-in experience with your airline.My mother, an elderly and disabled woman who requires a wheelchair, was subjected to unnecessary stress and humiliation at the check-in counter. Her passport includes the abbreviation Vve to indicate that she is a widow, as is standard in French documentation. Unfortunately, your staff seemed completely unprepared to understand or process this minor detail. They questioned the validity of her passport over those three small letters and nearly denied her boarding as a result.Despite my calm attempts to explain that Vve simply stands for veuve, meaning widow, the agent showed little understanding or empathy. This situation alone was distressing enough for my mother, who cannot stand for extended periods and was visibly uncomfortable.To make matters worse, another staff member came over and, in an extremely disrespectful manner, instructed my mother to sit on the luggage scale. Asking an elderly woman to sit on a scale in full view of other passengers is not only inappropriate but also deeply humiliating. This completely disregarded her dignity.The same staff then insisted on taking a photo of my mother s passport. I explained that this was sensitive personal information and that such an action was inappropriate. The agent acknowledged my concern but still refused to proceed without taking the photo.This entire ordeal was distressing, unprofessional, and unacceptable. My mother was left in tears, and I was shocked at how your staff handled the situation.I must ask Is this how Air Algeria treats elderly and disabled passengers? Why are staff members not trained to recognize common international document notations, or to handle such matters with care and respect?

The worse Airlines I have ever come across, almost all thier, flights delayed, up to 4hrs delay at transit without any compensation and my luggages where left behind on both trips, which I only received it after 2 weeks, one of bags was destroyed and I lost valuables inside which I wrote the customer service on several occasions but have never gotten a reply
Good in Algérie

The worst company ever. I bought my ticket with 19000 Da Istanbul back to Algeria due my researches I wanted to delay my trip back home until summer and as my family reached them, they said I need to pay 50 euros plus 80000 da ( 8 million avec notre derja) this doesn't make a sense by any means! This amount could be a round trip even ! How can you tell me that I would be able to change only within the limit of two months and I should make it open ( and even the programmed trips if I pay that amount is only till the month of march). When was this regulation of expensive extra fees created and why your customer service don't tell us abt these situations in advance.

I booked a trip from Paris to Johannesburg via Last Minute Booking - Air Algerie cancelled the flight 2 weeks before the flight. I have not received my refund and its 4 months later Last Minute keeps putting the blame on Air Algerie, as they have not refunded them. DO NOT USE THIS AIRLINE. I've rated both companies 1 star - because wow, what is this service. Based on their reviews I don't understand how they even have 2 stars on here.

It has been long time since I booked tickets with air algerie .Im very pleased to see positive change such as a good customer service, very friendly and supportive staff.I hope all the best to our air algerie,On the other hands, the service needs to be punctual , always running late . The airplane needTo be clean with good sanitary needs and hygiene at all the time .

My checked bag went missing after my flight with Air Algerie, and after some time the airline told me that it had been found at Bejaia Airport. They said it would be sent to my home address, since I had already left Algeria. After that message, everything stopped. I have been trying to contact Air Algerie since the summer emails, forms, messages and I have not received a single reply. No update about my bag, no explanation, no follow-up. Months have passed and the airline continues to ignore every attempt I make to resolve the situation. Losing a bag can happen with any airline, but the complete silence after confirming they had located it is unacceptable. My belongings have still not been returned, and I have had to deal with this entirely on my own. This has been one of the worst customer service experiences I have ever had, and I am sharing this so others are aware of how Air Algerie handles situations when something goes wrong.

Worst cross-ocean flight I ever had. Issues we had - They lost our luggage - They do not offer to pay to deliver our luggage, and asked us to pay UPS to get it delivered to us. No facilities at all in Algiers Airport, hence terrible experience during connection. For our return trip, they changed our flight without a reason, and forced us to wait at Algiers Airport for 9 hours for a connection without giving a viable alternative.

Almost no announcements in English during flight. Plane very dirty, like not cleaned for decades, decaying 737-600, couldn't eat the suspicious snack given. Online check-in is actually not available for Air Algerie flights, as you need to have your ticket printed in the old fashioned way. Staff were friendly and professional but can't make it better with the airline they're working to.
The most dirty airplane I ve been in, gum sticked to the chairs, drops of dry dirt everywhere, the table is dirty also something was poured on it and wasn t cleaned.

Very nice cabin, comfortable seats and good entertainment systems. The food tasted very good and there was enough food for the flight length. The flight attendants were all very friendly except 1 steward. (Plane 7T-VJA, Date 8 July 2019).

Paris to Oran. Very bad service for an extremely expensive price. The plane cabin was dirty, the seats uncomfortable. The cabin crew were incompetent and very haughty. Take this airline only when absolutely necessary. If you choose to spend your vacation it is a very bad choice. Unfortunately this company puts our country to shame

Amman to Barcelona via Algiers. I would not recommend this airlines at all. During my trip from Amman to Barcelona through Algiers, all my checked in luggage was lost, and it has not been found since. I submitted two claims, but the airline never got back to me (not answering phone or email).
London to Algiers. There was a slight delay, but the service onboard was excellent. Clean, very nice food and friendly personnel. Very pleased with the whole experience. Would fly Air Algerie again.

Algiers to Paris, the worst airline ever. Aircraft is old and dirty. Flight time was delayed and postponed. The check in process at counter is very slow. The only efficiency thing is their system down time. The staff is not well trained etc.

Bamako to Algiers. A 21 15 flight was delayed around 21 30. This was the first we heard anything. At around 22 30 we were told the plane would take off the next day. We were fed by 23 00. Around 00 00 shuttles started to a hotel. I got yelled at by airline personnel while boarding a shuttle. The last of us got to the hotel around 2 30 where we were dropped off with no information. The hotel was absolutely horrid. The hotel personnel shared no flight information so around noon the next day I asked for a number for the Air Algerie personnel who'd made the reservation. He picked up after about 3 calls and told me not to call back. Around 17 00 we were told to be ready to depart at 00 00. Around 23 40 2 shuttles came. There was a mad, unorganized rush to board the shuttles because there wasn't enough space. I got pushed and shoved but left behind. One shuttle left the hotel without having its door closed. Around 00 30 another shuttle came and I managed to get on. After standing in line at the airport for an hour I got a new boarding pass. I was assured that the luggage that I had handed over the previous day would be on the plane. Service on the flight was fairly decent. Plane landed around 8 00 and took off fine. The seat was absolutely filthy, however, and the bathroom was disgusting. My luggage did not come in. I tried to report my luggage as lost but was told I could not because I had no baggage claim tickets (they'd been taken by the airline when I got my new boarding pass). I was told to come back the next morning at 3 00. I got yelled at again while reporting the luggage lost. Another passenger said that a plane from Bamako was coming in at noon and we should wait so I did. luggage came in around 12 30.

My flight from Algiers to Paris was excellent. The crew was attentive and friendly throughout the journey, offering drinks and snacks regularly. The food was surprisingly good for an economy flight, with a choice of meals that were well-prepared. We arrived on time despite a slight delay at takeoff due to weather. The in-flight entertainment system worked well, with a good selection of movies and music. The seats were comfortable enough for a long-haul flight, and the cabin was clean. Overall, a pleasant experience, and I would definitely fly with Air Algerie again for their value for money and decent service.

Terrible experience with Air Algerie. Our flight from London to Algiers was delayed by 4 hours without any proper communication from the airline. When we finally boarded, the plane was old and visibly dirty, with stains on the seats and carpets. The seats were extremely uncomfortable, with little legroom. The food served was inedible cold and tasteless. Customer service at the airport was rude and unhelpful when we complained about the delay. To make matters worse, my checked luggage was lost and it took over two weeks to get it back, with no compensation offered. This was my first and last time flying with Air Algerie I strongly advise others to avoid them if possible.

Flew from Oran to Marseille with Air Algerie. The check-in process was smooth and the staff at the counter were polite. The flight departed on time, which was a relief. The cabin crew were professional and ensured everyone was comfortable. The meal provided was adequate, though not exceptional. However, the seats were a bit worn out, and the entertainment options were limited. Overall, it was a decent flight, and for the price, it's acceptable. I might consider them for future trips within the region.

Absolutely disastrous journey from Barcelona to Algiers via a connection. First, the initial flight was delayed, causing me to miss my connection. Air Algerie provided no assistance or rebooking I had to figure it out myself. When I finally got on a later flight, the plane was overcrowded and the air conditioning wasn't working properly, making it unbearably hot. The staff onboard seemed overwhelmed and not very helpful. My luggage arrived damaged, and the claim process was a nightmare with no response from customer service. This airline has a lot to improve in terms of reliability and customer care.

Positive experience on my recent trip from Algiers to Dubai. The flight was on time, and the boarding process was efficient. The crew members were courteous and went out of their way to assist passengers, especially those with special needs. The food was better than expected, with halal options and decent portions. The aircraft was modern and clean, with comfortable seating. I appreciated the free Wi-Fi on board, which made the flight more enjoyable. Air Algerie is improving, and I would recommend them for international routes.

From Tunis to Algiers, the flight was okay but not great. There was a 30-minute delay, but they did announce it. The plane was clean, and the staff were friendly. However, the food was subpar just a small sandwich and a drink. Seats were standard economy, nothing special. For short flights, it's fine, but I wouldn't choose them for longer journeys. The prices are competitive, though, so that's a plus.

Had a horrible time with Air Algerie from Paris to Algiers. The flight was canceled at the last minute without explanation, and rebooking was chaotic. When I finally flew the next day, the plane was filthy, with trash from previous flights still there. The crew seemed disinterested, and the food was awful. Customer service was nonexistent emails went unanswered. Lost my connecting flight due to their mess-up, and no apologies. This airline needs serious overhaul.

Enjoyed my flight from Algiers to Rome. Departed on time, arrived early even. The crew was attentive, providing good service throughout. The meal was tasty, with a choice of dishes. The plane was in good condition, seats comfortable. Entertainment was available, though limited. Overall, a good value airline for European routes. Would fly again.

Never flying Air Algerie again after my experience from New York to Algiers. Multiple delays, poor communication, and the worst customer service. The plane was outdated, seats broken, food disgusting. Luggage handling was incompetent, leading to lost bags. The staff at the airport were rude. This airline is a disgrace and should be avoided at all costs.

Flight from Istanbul to Algiers was decent. On time departure, clean aircraft, and the crew was helpful. Food was average but sufficient for the short duration. No major complaints, and the price was reasonable. Might use them again for regional flights.

Awful experience from Algiers to Frankfurt. The flight was delayed by 3 hours, and there was no information provided. The plane was cramped, seats uncomfortable, and the air was stale. Staff seemed overworked and not very responsive. Food was barely edible. Definitely not recommended for long-haul.

From Cairo to Algiers, the service was surprisingly good. Friendly staff, on-time flight, and decent in-flight meal. The plane was modern, and entertainment options were okay. A pleasant surprise compared to other airlines in the region.

Disappointing trip from Algiers to Madrid. Delayed by 2 hours, poor boarding organization, and the cabin was not clean. Crew was polite but overwhelmed. Food quality was low. For the price, it's not worth it.
Excellent flight from Paris to Algiers. Arrived early, excellent service from the crew, good food, and comfortable seats. The airline is improving, and I had a great experience overall.
From Algiers to Dubai, everything went smoothly. On time, professional staff, and the meal was tasty. The plane had good amenities, and I enjoyed the flight. Would book again.
Terrible from London to Algiers. Lost luggage, delayed flight, and rude staff. The plane was dirty, and customer service post-flight was nonexistent. Avoid this airline.
Short flight from Tunis to Algiers was fine. Quick, efficient, and the staff were courteous. No frills, but for the distance, it was acceptable.
From Algiers to Rome, the experience was mixed. Delayed takeoff, but the in-flight service was good. Food was okay, seats comfortable. Could be better with punctuality.
Never again with Air Algerie from Barcelona to Algiers. Flight canceled without notice, rebooking nightmare, and poor compensation. Staff unhelpful.

My journey from Algiers to Paris was outstanding. The flight departed right on time, and the crew greeted everyone warmly. The seats were spacious and comfortable, with ample legroom. The in-flight meal was delicious, featuring fresh ingredients and good presentation. Entertainment options were plentiful, keeping me engaged throughout. The landing was smooth, and baggage arrived quickly. Highly satisfied and would recommend Air Algerie for international travel.

Flew from London to Algiers and had a wonderful experience. The check-in was efficient, and the staff at the airport were polite and helpful. The aircraft was modern and spotlessly clean. The flight attendants were attentive, offering refreshments frequently. The food served was of high quality, with vegetarian options available. We arrived ahead of schedule, which was a bonus. Air Algerie exceeded my expectations.

From Cairo to Algiers, the flight was excellent. On-time departure and arrival, professional crew who ensured a pleasant journey. The cabin was well-maintained, and the seats provided good comfort. The meal included tasty dishes and was served promptly. I appreciated the smooth takeoff and landing. A reliable airline for regional flights.

Algiers to Istanbul flight was superb. The boarding process was quick, and the staff were friendly. The plane was in great condition, with comfortable seating and good air circulation. The in-flight service was top-notch, with courteous attendants. The food was flavorful and satisfying. Overall, a positive experience that I'd repeat.

From Algiers to Rome, everything was perfect. Punctual flight, clean aircraft, and dedicated crew. The seats were ergonomic, making the trip comfortable. Entertainment system worked flawlessly with a wide selection. Meals were well-prepared and enjoyable. Arrived on time with no issues. Air Algerie is improving significantly.

Flight from Paris to Algiers was delightful. Efficient check-in, on-time takeoff, and attentive service. The plane was tidy, seats comfortable. Food was excellent, with fresh options. Crew members were professional and smiling. A smooth and enjoyable journey.

Algiers to Dubai experience was fantastic. Departed on time, arrived early. Clean cabin, comfortable seats, great food. Staff were helpful and friendly. Entertainment was good. Highly recommend for long-haul.

1 star completely unacceptable. Air Algérie diverted my flight from Heathrow to Stansted without notifying me at all. I only found out through a friend, not the airline. That alone says everything about their communication or lack of it. I live near Heathrow, so being forced to travel an extra hour to Stansted was a major disruption. Worse still, I was traveling with my special needs daughter who requires a wheelchair. The airline showed zero consideration for passengers with disabilities or families with additional needs. Getting to Stansted is a serious challenge for us. No warning, no assistance, no empathy. This experience was stressful, exhausting, and completely avoidable. I would strongly advise disabled passengers and families to avoid Air Algérie.

My checked bag went missing after my flight with Air Algérie, and after some time the airline told me that it had been found at Béjaïa Airport. They said it would be sent to my home address, since I had already left Algeria. After that message, everything stopped. I have been trying to contact Air Algérie since the summer emails, forms, messages and I have not received a single reply. No update about my bag, no explanation, no follow-up. Months have passed and the airline continues to ignore every attempt I make to resolve the situation. Losing a bag can happen with any airline, but the complete silence after confirming they had located it is unacceptable. My belongings have still not been returned, and I have had to deal with this entirely on my own. This has been one of the worst customer service experiences I have ever had, and I am sharing this so others are aware of how Air Algérie handles situations when something goes wrong.

I am writing to express my deep dissatisfaction with the treatment my mother and I received during a recent flight check-in experience with your airline. My mother, an elderly and disabled woman who requires a wheelchair, was subjected to unnecessary stress and humiliation at the check-in counter. Her passport includes the abbreviation Vve to indicate that she is a widow, as is standard in French documentation. Unfortunately, your staff seemed completely unprepared to understand or process this minor detail. They questioned the validity of her passport over those three small letters and nearly denied her boarding as a result. Despite my calm attempts to explain that Vve simply stands for veuve, meaning widow, the agent showed little understanding or empathy. This situation alone was distressing enough for my mother, who cannot stand for extended periods and was visibly uncomfortable. To make matters worse, another staff member came over and, in an extremely disrespectful manner, instructed my mother to sit on the luggage scale. Asking an elderly woman to sit on a scale in full view of other passengers is not only inappropriate but also deeply humiliating. This completely disregarded her dignity. The same staff then insisted on taking a photo of my mother s passport. I explained that this was sensitive personal information and that such an action was inappropriate. The agent acknowledged my concern but still refused to proceed without taking the photo. This entire ordeal was distressing, unprofessional, and unacceptable. My mother was left in tears, and I was shocked at how your staff handled the situation. I must ask Is this how Air Algeria treats elderly and disabled passengers? Why are staff members not trained to recognize common international document notations, or to handle such matters with care and respect?
